title: Spicy Fish alla Italiana
description: A spicy Italian-inspired dish featuring pan-seared snapper with a bold curry sauce.
instructions: 2. Season the snapper fillets with salt and black pepper.
3. Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Add the garlic and sauté for 1 minute.
5. Add the curry paste and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
6. Add the snapper fillets and cook for 2-3 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
7. Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 5-7 minutes, or until the fish is cooked through.
8. Garnish with parsley and serve with lemon wedges.
